config.script:
'nx_fire #include "50560"
#ifdef NX_BROWSER
#comment '------------------------------------------ #comment ' budowa tablicy z typami obiektow danych (elemtny typu BOWI) #comment '------------------------------------------
function nx_create_obj_type_array(byval strTypeIdFilter) dim oBOWIArray : set oBOWIArray = nx_.new_array() dim oBOWI
if strTypeIdFilter <> "" then dim oFilterArray : set oFilterArray = nx_.new_array() oFilterArray.split_string strTypeIdFilter,";" dim strItem for each strItem in oFilterArray dim iTypeId : iTypeId = clng(strItem) set oBOWI = nx_.new_bowi(0,iTypeId, _ nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(iTypeId).human_name,nothing) oBOWIArray.add oBOWI next else dim oStdObjDef for each oStdObjDef in doc_.stdobjdef if not oStdObjDef.hidden() then set oBOWI = nx_.new_bowi(0,oStdObjDef.typeid, _ nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(oStdObjDef.typeid).human_name,nothing) oBOWIArray.add oBOWI end if next end if set nx_create_obj_type_array = oBOWIArray end function
#comment '------------------------------------------ #comment ' wybor typu obiektu (np. do robienia raportu) #comment '------------------------------------------
function nx_select_obj_type(byval strTypeIdFilter) dim oBOWIArray : set oBOWIArray = nx_create_obj_type_array("") if oBOWIArray.count = 1 then nx_select_obj_type = oBOWIArray(0).m_iIdObj exit function end if
oBOWIArray.sort nx_select_obj_type = nx_fire_array_choice_list(0,"Wybór typu danych","Typ danych", _ oBOWIArray) end function
#comment '------------------------------------------ #comment ' tworzenie ścieżki fp_node #comment '------------------------------------------ dim g_nx_path : set g_nx_path = nothing
#comment '------------------------------------------ #comment 'zwraca na zewnatrz sciezke #comment '------------------------------------------ function get_nx_path() set get_nx_path = g_nx_path end function
sub init_nx_path(byref oNXPath) set g_nx_path = oNXPath end sub
private sub append_to_path(byref oNewNode) if not g_nx_path is nothing then select case g_nx_path.nodetype #ifdef _DEBUG case 1 'nt_field err.raise 1,"append_to_path: węzeł typu pole" #endif case 2 'nt_ref set g_nx_path.ref_node = oNewNode case 3 'nt_wildref 'todo case 4 'nt_list set g_nx_path.child_node = oNewNode end select end if set g_nx_path = oNewNode end sub
sub nx_build_field_row(byref oASP,byref oEval,byref oOI) dim oField : set oField = nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(oOI.m_iTypeId). _ fields.get_field(oOI.m_iIdObj) dim strText select case oField.reltype case RELT_EMBED,NX_RELT_COMPUTED select case oField.sqltype case SQLlong strText = "liczba całkowita" case SQLdate strText = "data" case SQLtime strText = "godzina" case SQLcurrency strText= "kwota" case SQLqty strText = "ilość" case else strText = "tekst" end select case RELT_ENUM strText = "wybór opcji" case RELT_REF strText = "wskazanie na " + oField.get_ref_object(0).human_name case RELT_LIST strText = "lista elementów typu " + oField.get_ref_object(0).human_name case RELT_FILE strText = "plik" case RELT_WILDREF strText = "wskazanie wariantowe " end select oASP.newcell().e_label strText end sub
function on_choose_field_hli(byref pCallingPage,byref pHLI) dim oField : set oField = nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(pHLI.prop(GVAR_TYPEID)). _ fields.get_field(pHLI.prop(GVAR_OBJECT))
dim iNextTypeId dim iNextResult
select case oField.reltype case RELT_EMBED,RELT_ENUM,NX_RELT_COMPUTED append_to_path nx_.new_path_field(oField.parent.typeid,oField.name) pCallingPage.result = clng(1) pCallingPage.goback case RELT_REF,RELT_LIST if oField.reltype = RELT_REF then append_to_path nx_.new_path_ref(oField.parent.typeid,oField.name) else append_to_path nx_.new_path_list(oField.parent.typeid,oField.name) end if iNextTypeId = oField.get_reftypeid(0) dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(THIS_FILE) pPM.init_nx_path get_nx_path() iNextResult = pPM.nx_select_object_field(iNextTypeId) if iNextResult > 0 then pCallingPage.result = iNextResult pCallingPage.goback end if case RELT_FILE case RELT_WILDREF 'todo end select end function
#comment '------------------------------------------ #comment ' tworzenie tablicy BOWI pol obiektu #comment '------------------------------------------ function nx_create_obj_field_array(byval iTypeId) dim oBOWIArray : set oBOWIArray = nx_.new_array() dim oBOWI
dim oNXObjInfo : set oNXObjInfo = nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(iTypeId) dim oFieldColl : set oFieldColl = oNXObjInfo.fields dim iter for iter = 0 to oFieldColl.Count - 1 dim oField : set oField = oFieldColl.get_field(iter) if not oField.hidden then set oBOWI = nx_.new_bowi(iTypeId,iter,oField.human_name,nothing) oBOWIArray.add oBOWI end if next
'todo: referencje zwrotne
set nx_create_obj_field_array = oBOWIArray end function
#comment '------------------------------------------ #comment ' wybor pola obiektu (np. do robienia raportu) #comment ' -2 - zakonczono wybor pozytywnie #comment ' 0 - rezygnacja uzytkownika #comment ' > 0 - powrot z podwyboru #comment '------------------------------------------
function nx_select_object_field(byval iTypeId) dim oBOWIArray : set oBOWIArray = nx_create_obj_field_array(iTypeId) oBOWIArray.sort nx_select_object_field = nx_fire_array_choice_list_ex(0, _ "Wybór pola z " + nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(iTypeId).human_name,"Pole", _ oBOWIArray,false,getref("nx_build_field_row"),getref("on_choose_field_hli")) end function #endif
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment do wywalenia po przerobieniu #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------ #define LVAR_STRNAME 1
#include "50203" #include "50126"
'czy ma pokazywac referencje do danego obiektu na liscie dim g_bShowSelfReference: g_bShowSelfReference = false
'czy ma pokazywac pole do wprowadzania nazwy dla dzikiej referencji 'tylko dla sekcji SELECT dim g_bShowNameForWildReference: g_bShowNameForWildReference = false
'glebokosc dzikiej referencji np dla (1)10334;wpPointer(2)10333;strNazwa(2)10336;strNazwa(2)(1) ' to jest 2 dim g_nDepthOfWildReference: g_nDepthOfWildReference = 0
dim g_nTypeIdParent: g_nTypeIdParent = -1 dim g_nFieldIdParent: g_nFieldIdParent = -1
dim g_pPathBuilder: set g_pPathBuilder = nothing
dim bShowPosList
function fopen() bShowPosList = false end function
function fclose() if not g_pPathBuilder is nothing then g_pPathBuilder.GoBack end if end function
function ShowList() bShowPosList = true end function
function setParentInfo(byval nParentTypeId, byval nParentFieldId) g_nTypeIdParent = clng(nParentTypeId) g_nFieldIdParent = clng(nParentFieldId) end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' osobna analiza dzieci '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function child_points_to_parent(byref child_stdobjdef, byval nBackRefTypeid, byref strFiledName, byref strFieldHumanName): child_points_to_parent = false
strFiledName = "" strFieldHumanName = ""
dim child_field
for each child_field in child_stdobjdef if child_field.type = RELT_REF then if child_field.reftypeid = nBackRefTypeid then strFiledName = child_field.name strFieldHumanName = child_field.humanname child_points_to_parent = true exit function end if end if next end function
function back_ref_row(byref tab, byval strFieldHumanName, byval strObjectHumanName, _ byval strOpis, byval strFieldName, byval nBackRefTypeid, byval nParentTypeId, byval nFieldListId)
tab.newrow.newcell.addtext(strFieldHumanName).element.disable=true
dim hli: set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "add_backrefhli" 'nazwa pola wkazujacego na nasz obiekt - zwrotna ref hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME) = cstr(strFieldName) hli.prop(5001) = nBackRefTypeid
tab.newcell.addtexthli strOpis + strObjectHumanName , hli
end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'metody prywatne '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function fill_table(byref pStdObjDef , byref tab) dim pFieldDef dim iter: iter = 1
dim body dim row
dim namectrl, typectrl
'dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).removeall tab.section_body
dim namectrl_text dim namectrl_hli
dim typectrl_text dim typectrl_hli
for each pFieldDef in pStdObjDef set namectrl_hli = nothing set typectrl_hli = nothing
if pFieldDef.name <> "IdObj" and not pFieldDef.hidden then
tab.newrow
namectrl_text = pFieldDef.humanname
dim tekst: tekst = "" dim hli: set hli = doc_.createhli()
select case pFieldDef.type
case RELT_EMBED,RELT_ENUM ' embedded select case pFieldDef.sqltype
case SQLlong if pFieldDef.type = RELT_ENUM then tekst = "wybór opcji" else tekst = "liczba całkowita" end if
case SQLdate tekst = "data"
case SQLtime tekst = "godzina"
case SQLcurrency tekst = "kwota" case SQLqty tekst = "ilość" case else tekst = "tekst"
end select
hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "add_fieldhli" hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME) = cstr(pFieldDef.name) set namectrl_hli = hli
case RELT_REF ' ref tekst = "odwołanie do " + doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pFieldDef.reftypeid).humanname hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "add_refhli" hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME) = cstr(pFieldDef.name) set typectrl_hli = hli
case RELT_LIST ' list tekst = "lista " + doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pFieldDef.reftypeid).humanname hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "add_listhli" hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME) = cstr(pFieldDef.name) set typectrl_hli = hli
case RELT_WILDREF tekst = "" dim li: li = 0 while (pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(li) <> 0) if tekst <> "" then tekst = tekst + "," tekst = tekst + cstr(doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(li)).humanname) li = li + 1 wend
hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "add_wildrefhli" hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME) = cstr(pFieldDef.name) set typectrl_hli = hli end select
typectrl_text = tekst iter = iter + 1
tab.newcell.addtexthli namectrl_text , namectrl_hli if namectrl_hli is nothing then tab.element.disable = true end if tab.newcell.addtexthli typectrl_text , typectrl_hli if typectrl_hli is nothing then tab.element.disable = true end if
end if next
'if (bShowPosList) then
'-- spiko -- LP listy
if (pStdObjDef.child) then tab.newrow
set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "add_fieldhli" hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME) = "#LP" tab.newcell.addtexthli "Pozycja na liście" , hli
tab.newcell.addtext("liczba porządkowa").element.disable = true
end if
'end if
'-- EOF spiko
'---------Vtec '---------dopisanie pol z referencjami zwrotnymi
dim hdrtxt2 dim hdrcel2
tab.newrow.newcell tab.cell.backcolor = rgb(R_FOR_TABLE_HDR,G_FOR_TABLE_HDR,B_FOR_TABLE_HDR) tab.cell.colspan = 2
tab.addtext "Referencje zwrotne"
dim pParentObjDef dim nParentTypeId 'identyfikator ojca dim nFieldListId 'licznik numeru pola dim nBackRefTypeid 'obiekt referencji zwrotnej
dim bAccepted dim strOpis
for each pParentObjDef in doc_.stdobjdef
nFieldListId = clng(0) nParentTypeId = clng(pParentObjDef.typeid) nBackRefTypeid = clng(pParentObjDef.typeid)
'------szukamy
if not pParentObjDef.child then
'dzieci nie sa rozpatrywane samodzielnie 'dzieci analizujemy przez obiekt ojca
for each pFieldDef in pParentObjDef bAccepted = false strOpis = ""
'------zwykle zwrotne if pFieldDef.type = RELT_REF then if pFieldDef.reftypeid = pStdObjDef.typeid then bAccepted = true
strOpis = "odwołanie z " end if
'------dzikie zwrotne if pFieldDef.type = RELT_WILDREF then dim doc_li: doc_li = 0
while (pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(doc_li) <> 0) if pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(li) = pStdObjDef.typeid then bAccepted = true doc_li = doc_li + 1 wend
strOpis = "dzikie odwołanie z " end if
'------zwrotne przez liste if pFieldDef.type = RELT_LIST then if pFieldDef.reftypeid = pStdObjDef.typeid then bAccepted = true strOpis = "odwołanie z listy "
'dodatkowo wykonaj analize dziecka poprzez 'parenta
dim child_stdobjdef set child_stdobjdef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pFieldDef.reftypeid) dim strFldFormChild_Name, strFldFormChild_HumanName if (child_points_to_parent(child_stdobjdef, pStdObjDef.typeid, strFldFormChild_Name, strFldFormChild_HumanName)) then 'dziecko ma referencje do naszego obiektu przez z ojca 'o typie nParentTypeId
back_ref_row tab, strFldFormChild_HumanName, child_stdobjdef.HumanName, _ "odwołanie przez " + pFieldDef.humanname + " z ", strFldFormChild_Name, pFieldDef.reftypeid, nParentTypeId, nFieldListId
iter = iter + 1
end if
end if
'-------narysowanie ich 'if not pStdObjDef.hidden() and bAccepted = true then if bAccepted = true then
back_ref_row tab, pFieldDef.humanname, pParentObjDef.humanname, _ strOpis, pFieldDef.name, nBackRefTypeid, clng(-1), clng(-1)
iter = iter + 1 end if
nFieldListId = nFieldListId + 1
next 'pFieldDef
end if 'not is child next
'-----------referencja do obiektu tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Filtry dodatkowe") tab.cell.backcolor = rgb(R_FOR_TABLE_HDR,G_FOR_TABLE_HDR,B_FOR_TABLE_HDR) tab.cell.colspan = 2
if g_bShowSelfReference then
set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "add_fieldhli" hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME) = "IdObj"
tab.newrow.newcell.addtexthli "Cały obiekt " + pStdObjDef.humanname , hli tab.newcell.addtext("do listy wyboru")
end if
'------EO-Vtec end function
function add_fieldhli(byref hli) g_pPathBuilder.AddField(hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME)) page_.result = clng(1) page_.goback end function
function add_listhli(byref hli) dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(THIS_FILE) pPM.SetPathBuilder g_pPathBuilder.AddList(hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME))
dim result: result = pPM.select_object_field()
if result > 0 then page_.result = result page_.goback end if end function
function add_refhli(byref hli) dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(THIS_FILE) pPM.SetPathBuilder g_pPathBuilder.AddRef(hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME))
dim result: result = pPM.select_object_field()
if result > 0 then page_.result = result page_.goback end if end function
function add_backrefhli(byref hli) dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(THIS_FILE) pPM.SetPathBuilder g_pPathBuilder.AddBackRef(hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME), hli.prop(5001))
dim result: result = pPM.select_object_field()
if result > 0 then page_.result = result page_.goback end if end function
function add_wildrefhli(byref hli) dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(20308) pPM.SetPathBuilder g_pPathBuilder.AddWildRef(hli.prop(LVAR_STRNAME)), g_pPathBuilder.current.typeId
dim result: result = pPM.select_object_field()
if result > 0 then page_.result = result page_.goback end if end function
dim pArrTypeids
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' klasa pomocnicza dla NAVOArray.Operations ' realizuje funkcje OnSwap ' '-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Class CNavoArraySupport
Public mvarAnotherArray
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zamień dwa elementy ze sobą '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function swapelements(byref pnavoarray, byref nindexelem1, byref nindexelem2)
dim varelem
if IsObject(pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1)) then Set varElem = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) Set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) Set pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) = varElem else varElem = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem1) = pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) pNavoArray.Value(nIndexElem2) = varElem end if
Dim temp temp = mvarAnotherArray.Value(nIndexElem1) mvarAnotherArray.Value(nIndexElem1) = mvarAnotherArray.Value(nIndexElem2) mvarAnotherArray.Value(nIndexElem2) = temp end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest < elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function less(byval elem1, byval elem2) Less = (elem1 < elem2) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest > elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function more(byval elem1, byval elem2) More = (elem1 > elem2) end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------------- 'Czy element elem1 jest = elem2 '----------------------------------------------------------------------- public function equal(byval elem1, byval elem2) Equal = (elem1 = elem2) end function
end class
dim oNavoArraySupport
function fill_obj_table (byval strGivenTypeIds , byref tab)
dim iter: iter = 1
'tablica nazw obiektow dim pArrObjects set pArrObjects = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
dim pGivenObjects set pGivenObjects = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() if strGivenTypeIds <> "" then pGivenObjects.separate strGivenTypeIds,";" end if
'tablica typeid tych obiek set pArrTypeids = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
set oNavoArraySupport = new CNavoArraySupport set oNavoArraySupport.mvarAnotherArray = pArrTypeids set pArrObjects.Operations = oNavoArraySupport
dim pStdObjDef if strGivenTypeIds = "" then for each pStdObjDef in doc_.stdobjdef if not pStdObjDef.hidden() then pArrObjects.Add UCaseFirst(pStdObjDef.humanname) pArrTypeids.Add clng(pStdObjDef.typeid) end if next else for each pStdObjDef in doc_.stdobjdef if pGivenObjects.exists(cstr(pStdObjDef.typeid)) then pArrObjects.Add UCaseFirst(pStdObjDef.humanname) pArrTypeids.Add clng(pStdObjDef.typeid) end if next end if
pArrObjects.Sort
dim i for i = 0 to pArrObjects.Count()-1 dim namectrl
tab.newrow
if ((tab.rownr-1) mod 2) = 0 then tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if
dim hli set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(GVAR_CMD) = clng(CMD_GOBACK) hli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) = pArrTypeids.Value(i)
tab.newcell.addtexthli pArrObjects.Value(i) , hli tab.element.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) next
end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' select_object_field ' ' nTypeId - typ obiektu do prezentacji ' strComposedPath - composed path dla wybranego pola ' ' Pozwala użytkownikowi wybrać pole obiektu bazy danych i zwraca ' composed path z wyborem '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'leszek function select_object_field(byval nTypeId,byref strComposedPath)
function select_object_field()
#ifdef _DEBUG select_object_field = nx_select_object_field(g_pPathBuilder.current.typeId) exit function #endif
dim pStdObjDef: set pStdObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(g_pPathBuilder.current.typeId) page_.topelement.title = "Wybór pola z " + pStdObjDef.humanname
dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).removeall tab.section_head.removeall tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Pole").newcell.addtext("Typ")
fill_table pStdObjDef,tab
select_object_field = page_.domodalauto
end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' select_object ' ' Pozwala użytkownikowi wybrać obiekt bazy danych i zwraca jego typeid ' '--------------------------------------------------------------------------
function select_object #ifdef NX_BROWSER select_object = nx_select_obj_type("") #else dim trans set trans = trans_.createsubtran() 'to powoduje że po wyjściu z tej strony zwalniana jest pamięć page_.topelement.title = "Wybór obiektu"
dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).removeall tab.section_head.removeall tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Obiekt") tab.section_body.removeall fill_obj_table "" , tab select_object = page_.domodalauto #endif end function
function select_object_ex(byval givenTypeIds) #ifdef NX_BROWSER select_object_ex = nx_select_obj_type(givenTypeIds) #else 'najpierw sprawdzamy, czy przyopadkiem nie mamy tylko jednego typu 'podajemy to w stringu, kolejne typeid podzielone srdnikiem if givenTypeIds<> "" and instr(givenTypeIds,";")=0 then select_object_ex = clng(givenTypeIds) exit function end if
dim trans set trans = trans_.createsubtran() 'to powoduje że po wyjściu z tej strony zwalniana jest pamięć page_.topelement.title = "Wybór obiektu"
dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).removeall tab.section_head.removeall tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Obiekt") tab.section_body.removeall
fill_obj_table givenTypeIds , tab select_object_ex = page_.domodalauto #endif end function
function SetPathBuilder(byref pPathBuilder) set g_pPathBuilder = pPathBuilder end function
function GetPathBuilder() set GetPathBuilder = g_pPathBuilder end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' setShowSelfReference ' ' ustawia czy w liscie ma byc pokazana referencja do samego obiektu ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function setShowSelfReference(byVal val) g_bShowSelfReference = val end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' setShowNameForWildReference ' 'czy ma pokazywac pole do wprowadzania nazwy dla dzikiej referencji 'tylko dla sekcji SELECT ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function setShowNameForWildReference(byVal val) g_bShowNameForWildReference = val end function
'-------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' ' setDepthOfWildReference ' ' ustawia glebokosc dla dziekij referencji ' '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- function setDepthOfWildReference(byVal val) g_nDepthOfWildReference = val end function
'-------------------------------------- 'tworzy listę adresów z wyborem jednego '-------------------------------------- function select_object_address(byref oBSArr) page_.topelement.title = "Wybór adresu"
dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(5000)).removeall tab.section_head.removeall tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Ulica").newcell.addtext("Miejscowość").newcell.addtext("Gmina").newcell.addtext("Powiat").newcell.addtext("Województwo")
fill_table_addresses oBSArr,tab
select_object_address = page_.domodalauto end function
'--------------------------------- 'tworzy kolejne rekordy z adresami '--------------------------------- function fill_table_addresses(byref oBSArr, byref tab) tab.section_body if is_record(oBSArr) then dim iter, strLine, strNazwa dim hli, strUlica for iter = 0 to UBound(oBSArr) strUlica = Trim(oBSArr(iter).StreetName) if strUlica = "" then strUlica = "(brak ulicy)" end if set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "select_address" hli.prop(1) = clng(iter + 1) 'ulica tab.newrow.newcell.addtexthli strUlica, hli 'miejscowość tab.newcell.addtext(Trim(oBSArr(iter).LocalityName)) 'gmina tab.newcell.addtext(Trim(oBSArr(iter).BaseAdminUnitName)) 'powiat tab.newcell.addtext(Trim(oBSArr(iter).SubAdminUnitName)) 'województwo tab.newcell.addtext(Trim(oBSArr(iter).TopAdminUnitName)) next else tab.newrow.newcell.addtext("Brak adresów dla podanego kodu pocztowego") tab.cell.colspan = 5 end if end function
function is_record(byref oBSArr): is_record = false dim iter for iter = 0 to UBound(oBSArr) if Trim(oBSArr(iter).StreetName) <> "" then is_record = true exit function end if next end function
function select_address(byref hli) page_.result = clng(hli.prop(1)) page_.goback end function
